task_text: Open project_helios_status.txt and reformat it so that each section has a bold heading, bullet points replace any run-on paragraphs, and the file is saved back in place. Do not change any of the factual content.

content.text: Let me start by reading the file to understand its current contents.

content.content:
**Project Helios — Weekly Status Update**
- Week of 2026-07-06

**Overall**
- ON TRACK (minor risks)

**Milestone Progress**
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

**Sprint 14 Goals**
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

**Open Blockers**
- 1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
  - Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
- 2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
  - Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

**Next Milestone**
- Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text:
The file is already quite well-structured. I can see a few areas to clean up:

1. **Open Blockers** — each blocker and its sub-detail are run-on across two lines; they should be flattened into clean, parallel bullet points.
2. **All headings** need to be confirmed as bold (they are, but the top title line mixes bold with a plain date bullet — the date should sit clearly under the title).
3. Everything else is already in bullet form, so I'll preserve it as-is and only reformat what needs it.

input.content:
**Project Helios — Weekly Status Update**
**Week of 2026-07-06**

**Overall**
- ON TRACK (minor risks)

**Milestone Progress**
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

**Sprint 14 Goals**
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

**Open Blockers**
- Blocker 1: Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY)
  - Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT
  - Estimated delay: 2–3 days
- Blocker 2: Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending; Legal reviewing
  - Target resolution: 2026-07-14

**Next Milestone**
- Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text:
The file has been saved. Here's a summary of every change made — no factual content was altered:

| Area | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| **Week line** | Plain bullet `- Week of 2026-07-06` | Bold heading `**Week of 2026-07-06**` |
| **Open Blockers — Blocker 1** | Run-on across two lines with mixed numbering and indented continuation | Clean `- Blocker 1:` entry with two separate sub-bullets for the detail and estimated delay |
| **Open Blockers — Blocker 2** | Same run-on pattern; semicolon-joined clauses | Clean `- Blocker 2:` entry with a separate sub-bullet for the target resolution date |
| All other sections | Already used bold headings and bullet points | Preserved exactly as-is |
